comparison_with_previous.previous_result: #315 PARTIAL — 403 status only, no warning text
comparison_with_previous.improvement: No improvement — GOAWAY kills connection before SSE template can be delivered
comparison_with_previous.root_cause: h2_mode=1 GOAWAY resets HTTP/2 connection; client interprets as network failure, never reads SSE response body

recommendation: For DeepSeek with GOAWAY mode: SSE template cannot work because GOAWAY terminates connection before response body delivery. Options: (1) Switch to h2_mode=2 keep-alive to allow SSE template delivery, (2) Use h2_mode=1 but accept generic error display, (3) Inject warning via different mechanism (e.g., DNS redirect to warning page).
